summary: Extended the qd report checker to enforce documented status vocabularies for completion and audit report array fields while keeping existing report compatibility.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Completion acceptanceEvidence statuses are constrained to passed/failed/not_required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates completion `acceptanceEvidence[].status` values and rejects strings outside `passed`, `failed`, and `not_required`.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Completion commandsRun statuses are constrained to passed/failed/not-run.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates completion `commandsRun[].status` values and rejects strings outside `passed`, `failed`, and `not-run`.
scripts/qd-reports-check.sh keeps the existing `validate_real_world_status` constraint for completion and audit reports.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Audit acceptanceReviewed statuses are constrained to passed/failed/not_required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates audit `acceptanceReviewed[].status` values and rejects strings outside `passed`, `failed`, and `not_required`.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The checker emits file-scoped errors for invalid status values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-status-vocabulary-check/commands.log records a temporary-copy invalid status smoke test failing with a file-scoped error.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: just qd-reports-check and just check pass.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded under this node's required paths.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; no product runtime behavior is claimed.
